source_deck.provenance: User-supplied external review artifact; not redistributed in this repository. Reproduction requires a file with this exact SHA-256.

slides.title: Robonix 运行时通信机制
slides.verdict: Conceptually correct when ROS 2, gRPC, and MCP are read as transports rather than capability modes.
reconciled_claims: Atlas registers and resolves providers but does not proxy business payloads.
Pilot discovers model-visible MCP capabilities and produces RTDL; Executor invokes external MCP providers.
A provider may declare more than one transport, including multiple transports for one contract.

slides.title: Communication topology and API sketch
slides.verdict: A dated, non-exhaustive topology sketch; it is not a normative API or transport matrix.
reconciled_claims: Short labels such as /rgb, /odom, and /map are endpoint examples, not stable contract IDs.
A transport shown for one path is not an exclusive binding and omitted interfaces still exist.
The current Executor, Liaison, Soma, and Scene APIs are broader than the slide excerpts.
The pinned repository references audio, mapping, navigation, and explore as external packages, so their mutable implementations are outside this exact-revision audit.
The in-tree Tiago lidar reference is a 2D lidar implementation; the slide's lidar3d label is not its interface.
